zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Tendring於1485年10月4日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可騰德林 霍爾時，她的父親William de Tendring20歲，母親Thomazine Sidney41歲。她於1505年與Robert Foster 13th ggf在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年在英國艾可伯奇享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Tendring was born on 4 October 1485, in Tendring Hall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Tendring, was 20 and her mother, Thomazine Sidney, was 41. She married Robert Foster 13th ggf in 1505, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1545, in Birch, Essex, England, at the age of 60.

Elle a épousé Robert Foster 13th ggf en 1505, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1545, à Birch, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Tendringが1485年10月4日にイギリスイギリススフォルクテンドリング ハルで生まれた時，父William de Tendringは20歳，母Thomazine Sidneyは41歳であった。1505年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでRobert Foster 13th ggfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年にイギリスエセックスバーチで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Tendring(이)가 1485년 10월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 텐드링 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Tendring(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomazine Sidney(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Robert Foster 13th ggf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 영국 에세스 비르치에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Tendring родилась 4 октября 1485 г. в местности тендринг холл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Tendring было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomazine Sidney, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Foster 13th ggf в 1505 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1545 г. в местности бирч, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.
